LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, APR-11-2022 HEARING HELD RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF CHARLES MENIFEE. THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: AVREK LAW FIRM'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF CHARLES MENIFEE IS GRANTED. AVREK LAW FIRM IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT USING THE MANDATORY JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-17-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 Continued To May-16-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to May 16, 2023 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-11-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. NABIL A. FREIJ, Esq. of Avrek Law Firm (Tel: 949-313-3577) as movant/counsel-of-record for plaintiff Charles Menifee;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF CHARLES MENIFEE.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court rules as follows: Avrek Law Firm's motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Charles Menifee is granted.

Avrek Law Firm is to prepare and submit a proposed order to the court using the mandatory Judicial Council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
